title: SpaceX acquires AI startup Cursor for $60 billion
summary: The purchase reinforces the company's strategy in artificial intelligence after its IPO.

title: Android 17 arrives with improved multitasking tools and Gemini features
summary: The operating system update is now available for Pixel and other devices with new AI capabilities.

title: SpaceX's valuation exceeds $2.6 trillion and briefly surpasses Amazon
summary: The growth of the aerospace company reflects the success of its missions and satellite services.

title: Apple will change its Hide My Email feature reducing its privacy effectiveness
summary: The modification will allow senders to track more information despite anonymity.

title: Robinhood lays off 10% of its workforce to flatten its organizational structure
summary: The company seeks to simplify its operation and reduce costs in a volatile market environment.

title: The Department of Justice defends xAI's gas turbines as a matter of national security
summary: The US government argues that unauthorized turbines are essential for economic and energy security.

title: Snap launches its augmented reality glasses Specs at a high price and with limited functionality
summary: CEO Evan Spiegel states that the glasses are crucial for the company's mission to integrate augmented reality.

title: OpenAI and Anthropic lose money on their most advanced AI models according to new report
summary: When model usage exceeds 11% of capacity, the companies incur operating losses.

title: SpaceX changes Starlink conditions after IPO: antenna is no longer free
summary: Users will now have to pay rent for the antenna and purchase the Mini Dish separately.

title: India temporarily bans Telegram for exam fraud
summary: The Indian government orders the blocking of the app after detecting its use in academic fraud.

title: German court rules that Google's AI summaries are a search format and not original content
summary: The decision sets a precedent for copyright on results generated by artificial intelligence.

title: DeepSeek receives external investment valuing the company at $50 billion
summary: The Chinese AI startup attracts capital for the first time, marking a milestone in its expansion.

title: Fox acquires Roku for $22 billion in cash and stock
summary: The merger combines Fox's television content with Roku's streaming platform.

title: Salesforce buys AI agent platform Fin for $3.6 billion
summary: The acquisition seeks to boost intelligent automation in its enterprise suite.

title: Vulnerability in FIFA's internal system allowed modifying match broadcasts
summary: The security flaw exposed the possibility of altering the television signal of World Cup matches.

title: Rivian lays off hundreds of employees after starting R2 deliveries
summary: The electric vehicle company adjusts its workforce to optimize costs and production.

title: Threads reaches 500 million monthly users and adds customized features
summary: Meta's social network continues its growth and introduces new community tools.

title: Baby formula sold at Target recalled due to infant botulism outbreak in three states
summary: Health authorities warn about a potentially deadly infection linked to the product.

title: KDE Plasma 6.7 introduces virtual desktops per screen and a unified theme system
summary: The new version of the desktop environment includes updates for Wayland and performance improvements.

title: EU plans to prohibit operators from installing Chinese routers for security
summary: The measure aims to protect European telecommunications infrastructure from potential risks.
